mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dramas
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_records
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM recharge_records WHERE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{d}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_records WHERE DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) = #{d}
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS n FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS n FROM recharge_records WHERE DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) AS stat_date, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amt FROM recharge_records WHERE DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND GROUP BY DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT stat_date AS stat_date, COALESCE(SUM(metric_value), 0) AS n FROM daily_stats WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND LOWER(metric) IN ('views', 'view', 'total_views', 'plays', 'view_count') GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_records WHERE DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND NOT AND NOT

SELECT IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(country),''), '未知') AS label, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM recharge_records WHERE DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND GROUP BY label ORDER BY amt DESC

SELECT IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(platform),''), '未知') AS label, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM recharge_records WHERE DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND GROUP BY label ORDER BY amt DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_records WHERE DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND AND is_first_recharge = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{d}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dramas WHERE is_online = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_episodes), 0) FROM dramas

SELECT d.id AS drama_id, d.title AS drama_name, d.status, d.total_episodes, d.view_count, d.category_id, c.name AS category_name, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS recharge_amount, COUNT(r.id) AS recharge_count, COUNT(DISTINCT r.user_id) AS recharge_users, SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_first_recharge = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS first_recharge_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM promotion_links pl WHERE pl.drama_id = d.id) AS link_count FROM dramas d LEFT JOIN recharge_records r LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = d.category_id WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY recharge_amount DESC, d.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dramas d WHERE 1=1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS recharge_amount, COUNT(r.id) AS recharge_count, COUNT(DISTINCT r.user_id) AS recharge_users, SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_first_recharge = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS first_recharge_count FROM dramas d LEFT JOIN recharge_records r WHERE 1=1

SELECT IFNULL(c.name, '未分类') AS label, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS amt, COUNT(r.id) AS cnt FROM recharge_records r JOIN dramas d ON d.id = r.drama_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = d.category_id WHERE DATE(COALESCE(r.local_order_time, r.created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND GROUP BY label ORDER BY amt DESC

SELECT DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) AS stat_date, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM recharge_records WHERE drama_id = #{dramaId} AND DATE(COALESCE(local_order_time, created_at)) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date ASC
